setup: Visit orlixai.xyz — free to use, no account required to start
For Token Analyzer: paste any Base contract address and get AI risk verdict instantly
For AI Chat: choose from 19 models including Claude, GPT-4o, Grok, Gemini, DeepSeek, and more
For Telegram: message @orlixai_bot for full Orlix access inside Telegram
Hold $ORLIX on Base for ecosystem access: 0x799c28BAC95B3E0B26534D1e9A586511895EcBA3
